name: privatevault
description: PrivateVault personal database with React UI, Node bridge, and C TLS authentication server.

scripts.dev: concurrently -k --names C-SERVER,BRIDGE,FRONTEND --prefix-colors blue,magenta,green "npm run dev:c" "npm run dev:bridge" "npm run dev:frontend"
scripts.clean:local: rm -rf personal-server-c/certs personal-server-c/user_db.txt personal-server-c/*.o personal-server-c/server personal-server-c/client
